evals.prompt: La web de La Nonna (restaurante italiano en Gràcia, Next.js 15) carga lenta en móviles. El next.config.ts solo tiene el plugin de next-intl y las imágenes remotas de Unsplash configuradas — sin optimizePackageImports. El layout usa Playfair Display y Lato via next/font con display: swap. El hero carga una imagen de Unsplash 1920px con priority y fill, pero sin el atributo sizes. El Lighthouse de móvil da Performance 71. ¿Cuáles son las optimizaciones más importantes que debería aplicar antes del deploy en Vercel?
evals.expected_output: Diagnóstico claro de los problemas (hero sin sizes, falta optimizePackageImports, etc.), optimizaciones ordenadas por impacto con código listo para copiar, y estimación de mejora en puntos de Lighthouse.

assertions.name: mentions-sizes-attribute
assertions.description: The response identifies the missing `sizes` attribute on the hero image as a priority fix

assertions.name: includes-working-code
assertions.description: The response includes actual code examples (not just advice) with `sizes` attribute or other specific code

assertions.name: mentions-optimizePackageImports
assertions.description: The response recommends adding `optimizePackageImports` to next.config.ts

assertions.name: ordered-by-impact
assertions.description: The optimizations are presented in priority or impact order, not a flat unordered list

assertions.name: includes-metric-estimate
assertions.description: The response estimates expected improvement in Lighthouse score or LCP time

evals.prompt: Quiero configurar el bundle analyzer en La Nonna (Next.js 15, desplegado en Vercel) para entender qué está inflando el bundle antes del deploy. El proyecto usa next-intl, Zod, Resend (solo en server actions), y CSS puro sin ninguna librería de componentes. Dame los pasos completos para instalar, configurar y analizar el bundle.
evals.expected_output: Instalación de @next/bundle-analyzer, configuración en next.config.ts, comando ANALYZE=true npm run build, y explicación de qué buscar en el reporte para next-intl y Zod.

assertions.name: includes-install-command
assertions.description: Response includes `npm install --save-dev @next/bundle-analyzer` or equivalent install command

assertions.name: includes-next-config-code
assertions.description: Response shows how to configure next.config.ts (or next.config.js) with the bundle analyzer wrapper

assertions.name: includes-analyze-command
assertions.description: Response includes the `ANALYZE=true npm run build` command (or equivalent)

assertions.name: mentions-next-intl-in-report
assertions.description: Response specifically mentions what to look for regarding next-intl in the bundle report

assertions.name: notes-server-only-packages
assertions.description: Response notes that Resend (server-only) should not appear in the client bundle, or explains server vs client bundle distinction
